Dialog.name: MSG_701_000
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}I've never seen one this big before, but there's no time... We have to end this, now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_701_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 2 -1 0 0}Ngh... It called in reinforcements! Just what we needed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_701_2_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 8 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 2 0 5}There's even less time until impact now! Hurry![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_701_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}Hurry how!? Arrgh, we gotta take it down soon...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_701_2_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}The monorail is going even faster now! You're running out of time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_701_3_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}Oh man, we're in deep shit here...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_701_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 5}Hey! Are you all right!? Say something![n]{f 1 1}
